widgetData.source_sentence: Contractor shall be liable to pay the actual expenses incurred in measurements.

The Contractor shall at his own expense provide himself with sheds, storehouses and yards in such situations and in such numbers
The responsibility of successful completion of work by subcontractor shall lie with Contractor.
